description: §38.13.4 — a V5-strict DERIVED const (`const <threshold> = @maxTotal * 2`) inside a `watches=` channel body does NOT fire E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-CLIENT-WRITE. A derived const is READ-ONLY — it has no bidirectional §38.4 sync path to forbid, so only a genuine non-const synced cell (`<x> = init`) is forbidden. Locks the CLIENT-WRITE fidelity boundary.
rationale: §38.13.4 forbids a V5-strict synced cell (`<x> = init`) in a `watches=` body because it implies a client->server write path. A DERIVED const is read-only (no sync path), so it is legal and E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-CLIENT-WRITE does NOT fire.
